title: heterolamium flaviflorum
intro: Heterolamium flaviflorum, also known as the yellow-flowered Heterolamium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Heterolamium flaviflorum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
